cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Andrew could have gone to the clothing store. The key here is to look at all the times he was seen doing other things and see when he was free. The store is closed after 9pm, so that's the latest he could go. First, Andrew woke up at 5am. Then William saw him playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So he was busy then. Then Jessica saw him buying lunch from 6am to 9am. So from 6 to 9 am he's at the deli. Then Tiffany saw him
